programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: When Redbird takes one of Buff's stuffed animals without asking and it accidentally gets swiped by the Legion of Zoom, Red enlists Bam to help him make a daring rescue.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders
programme.desc: Carina Capybara hires The Looney Builders to build her Samba School a float for Brazil's Carnaval parade; she soon realizes the float can be better if they incorporate her students' ideas.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go
programme.desc: Thomas pretends to be a hero to help ensure the movie screen Nia's delivering arrives clean and pristine; Percy feels anxious about spending a night away from home during an overnight delivery with Thomas and Nia.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Café Carl have a fancy idea; Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show; when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Auntie, Uncle Pig and cousin Chloe are coming for dinner and after doing multiple chores, Peppa is allowed to join too! Peppa is very proud of staying up late, she even stayed up later than the Daddies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV, until it breaks; while Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything, but it doesn't beat their old TV; when they hear their old TV is fixed, they send the new TV back to the shop!

programme.title: Peppa Pig

Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: One On One - EP 1
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will reveal stories that have never been shared with celebrities in the country.

programme.title: Durrani - Perjuangan Lion Mum - EP 10
programme.desc: Durrani is determined to show the court that Salleh’s condition does not equate to incompetence. Meanwhile, Reza continues his crusade to help Amir escape the manipulative grip of CoreWay. Mazlan unexpectedly visits Saliha in a bid to repair their strained relationship, but the unannounced gesture only reinforces her boundaries. Durrani is caught off guard when Saliha shows up at her office unanno

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 58
programme.desc: Kathy eventually succeeds in softening Riqmal’s heart, leading them to repair their marriage and move back in together. Elsewhere, Zara makes a life-changing decision and agrees to marry Gibran.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 22
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Is COVID-19 still around? Why do my COVID-19 symptoms last for 4 weeks? How do we overcome Long COVID and what is the best way to prevent it? Dive into the topic with Huda Ali and Syed Azmir.

programme.title: Pasca Kau Pergi - EP 3
programme.desc: Azlina finally returns home, but Faris greets her with cold distance. As tensions simmer, Azlina struggles to adjust to caring for Zulkifli.

programme.title: (Live) Berita 2026/2027

programme.desc: 4 personalities from 4 different backgrounds embark on a journey in the United Kingdom on a mission to explore the Premier League's leading stadiums. A vacation that is supposed to be fun but there are tasks that need to be completed.

programme.title: Durrani - Perjuangan Lion Mum - EP 11
programme.desc: Durrani and Mikhail uncover that helper Ina may not be the aggressor of her employer, but a victim of long-term emotional and physical abuse. Reza gathers evidence to expose CoreWay, only to be publicly humiliated. Saliha’s firm stance on divorcing Mazlan causes friction at home. Roslina and Mikhail’s strained relationship finds healing after Farid gently encourages his mother to pursue happiness.

programme.title: Setia itu Mahal - EP 12
programme.desc: Growing bolder, Farid takes Dalina out on increasingly public dates, showering her with lavish gifts. Their secrecy is threatened when Dr. Sofea—Hakim’s colleague and Farid’s former schoolmate—unexpectedly spots them together.

programme.title: Timeless Memories - EP 10 / 业落夕阳
programme.desc: Shengda dies suddenly and leaves Weiwei a gashapon machine dispensing fortune readings. The superstitious Weiwei follows the reading and calls Jiawei uncle. Obsessed, she sells handmade readings to her classmates to earn money. For better results, she uses Doudou to cheat in her exam. When Doudou stops talking to her, she panics and reveals Shengda’s last wish to save her parents’ marriage.

programme.desc: Real estate agent Luo Yingchen, overwhelmed by debt-collection calls and messages from her autistic sister, suffers a severe headache but still drives out to meet a client. She encounters a staged accident scam, but Ling Weimin intervenes to expose the fraud and helps treat her ankle injury.

programme.desc: Dylan from Season 4 returns. After joining KOC, he pursued his dreams and traded life as an accountant to become a sommelier and bar owner. In a surprising twist, chef and contestant share an unexpected bond beyond the competition.

programme.desc: Jiawei regrets his blind faith in fortune-telling and takes fate into his own hands. Liang sees the lonely Cheng making companions for his paper offerings and wonders if it’s a mistake to give him life. Cheng learns that he is a paper effigy after being burned and drenched. A remorseful Liang tries to make up to Cheng by treating him like his own. The family of two celebrate new year together.

programme.desc: Come explore the world with Blippi! There are so many exciting things to explore and learn. Feed your kids' curiosity while they learn about vehicles, animals, the natural world and so much more.

programme.title: Blippi Visits - EP 1
programme.desc: Join Blippi on his visits to exciting places such as children's museums and the zoo!

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6 - EP 24
programme.desc: The gang and the aliens are baking bread. But the aliens' Impatience causes an accident in the kitchen and they create a dough man that won't stop growing. Can they save ollipolis from a sticky situation? Ollie, Cherry and Sloppy enter a film competition with their own rendition of Rapunzel. A myserious stranger in a cape auditions for the part of the knight.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
programme.desc: Maria Altman, a Jewish refugee, along with her lawyer Randy Schoenberg, faces several difficulties while reclaiming the painting of her aunt, which was seized by the Nazis before World War II.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Equipped with an elaborate plan, clear vision and unwavering determination, Richard Williams, a sports coach, encourages his daughters, Venus and Serena, to become tennis champions.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: After waking up with amnesia in a hospital, Robert Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks, one of his doctors, to protect the world from the evil plan of a scientist.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: The husband of Margaret Keane, a phenomenal painter, wrongfully claims credit for her works and enjoys her success until a legal battle between the two reveals the truth to the world.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: Hank, a prison guard, is a part of convicted murderer Lawrence Musgrove's execution, but when he meets Leticia, a Black woman, he becomes smitten with her, unaware that she is Musgrove's widow.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer while a determined U.S. Marshal attempts to nab him.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: Five years after saving the Lego world, Emmet must once again save everyone with the help of Rex Dangervest when new enemies from outer space attack them.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker faces Electro and his old friend who is dying and looks out for Spider-Man's blood in order to cure himself.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Optimus Prime seeks his creator in space. Meanwhile, humans and Autobots join forces to save Earth from an ancient threat.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
programme.desc: Bestowed with superpowers, Shazam and his foster siblings join forces against the daughters of Atlas who have stolen the Wizard's broken staff.

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: Two detectives put their differences aside to save the kidnapped daughter of a diplomat.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 3 / 我们的国家公园 III
programme.desc: Northeast China Tiger and Leopard National Park stretches across vast forests and snowy plains in Jilin and Heilongjiang, at the border of China, Russia, and North Korea. programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead; but when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

During the holidays, the first responders must deal with a stampede at a toy store, a mistletoe stunt gone awry and neighbors competing in a Christmas light showdown; Bobby contemplates his future with Athena; Chimney and Buck try to help Maddie.
Bobby meets Athena's parents for the first time; Maddie attempts to end her marriage for good, causing Doug to insinuate himself even deeper into Chimney's life.
Chimney's history at Station 118 is explored as he works hard to become the paramedic and firefighter he is known to be.
The first responders rally together to search for a missing Maddie.

The call center is hit with a system-wide power outage and must go old school to respond to emergencies; the first responders must deal with explosions in multiple homes and a difficult childbirth; Michael confronts Bobby about parenting his kids.
When a going-away party for a bank manager turns into an emergency, the first responders are accused of pulling off a daring heist.
After his devastating family tragedy in Minnesota, Bobby Nash moves to Los Angeles to start over, where he becomes captain of the 118 and meets Athena Grant for the first time.
The first responders deal with a calamity at a chocolate factory; a mail bomb explosion; Eddie receives some surprising news from Shannon; Maddie contemplates her future in the call center.

A stunt driver is caught in a hairy situation; a teenage social influencer is bugging out; the city is on high alert after two mail bombs go off; Eddie's family comes to town; Buck faces a life-or-death situation.
